text.title: llamaindex-production-gotchas Core Rules
text.summary: Rules patching known LlamaIndex production failure modes: async blocking, retriever concurrency, ReAct error handling, eval cost, observability.

rule.statement: Inside async endpoints, always call .aquery() not .query(). The sync .query() blocks the event loop and causes head-of-line blocking.
rule.rationale: FastAPI workers hanging in production traced to .query() inside async def; .aquery() resolves it.

rule.statement: Wrap SubQuestionQueryEngine.query() in asyncio.to_thread when calling from an async context; or call .aquery_engine. Sub-question fan-out is unbounded by default.
rule.rationale: SubQuestion engine internally fans out; bound concurrency or move to a thread pool.

rule.statement: QueryFusionRetriever must be capped at num_workers=4-8. Default is unbounded and trips rate-limit cliffs.
rule.rationale: Unbounded fusion opens 30+ concurrent LLM calls on the first multi-query request.

rule.statement: Wrap every ReActAgent tool with try/except that returns a structured error string. ReActAgent does not auto-recover from tool exceptions.
rule.rationale: A failing tool currently propagates as an unhandled exception, killing the agent loop.

rule.statement: Sample eval sets proportionally to budget (10-50 per metric per build); never run full faithfulness+relevancy+correctness on the entire set every CI run.
rule.rationale: A single full eval run on 1k samples can cost over $80 on GPT-4-class judges.

rule.statement: Wire LlamaIndex Callbacks (TokenCountingHandler + custom observability) at app boot. Untraced LlamaIndex runs are blind.
rule.rationale: Without callbacks you cannot answer 'why did this query cost $0.30?' after the fact.

rule.statement: Use response.print_response_stream() only when streaming is configured at the query_engine level. Mixing modes corrupts output.
rule.rationale: Streaming must be opted-in at engine construction; partial streaming corrupts the response buffer.

rule.statement: Cache embeddings at the IngestionPipeline boundary (cache=IngestionCache(...)); never embed inline in a query path.
rule.rationale: Inline embedding on every query adds 200-500ms; cache it once at ingestion.

rule.statement: Stub rule for conclusion 'r-advanced' referenced from 06-decision-tree.xml. Replace with the real testable rule that resolves this branch of the tree.
rule.rationale: Auto-added by fix-methodology-phase-d.py to keep tree refs resolvable.

rule.statement: Stub rule for conclusion 'r-default-high' referenced from 06-decision-tree.xml. Replace with the real testable rule that resolves this branch of the tree.
rule.rationale: Auto-added by fix-methodology-phase-d.py to keep tree refs resolvable.

rule.statement: Stub rule for conclusion 'r-default-low' referenced from 06-decision-tree.xml. Replace with the real testable rule that resolves this branch of the tree.
rule.rationale: Auto-added by fix-methodology-phase-d.py to keep tree refs resolvable.
